durable_improvement: Added a fail-closed verifier for the deployment evidence manifest, checking exact evidence membership, sorted order, file sizes, SHA-256 digests, manifest digest, immutable source commit, and workflow run identity.

verification.route: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical source

blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values before the authoritative workflow can deploy and prove a resolving hostname.
next_action: Wire build-deployment-evidence-manifest.mjs and verify-deployment-evidence-manifest.mjs into the authoritative workflow before upload, then dispatch after Cloudflare credentials are configured.
